node_summary.purpose: Complete single-page application containing all markup, styling, and interactivity for the Anyly Studio art commission website. Serves as the sole entry point and contains the entire application code.
node_summary.behavior: 1. Browser loads HTML document with embedded CSS and JS 2. Google Fonts preconnect and load (Cormorant Garamond, Montserrat) 3. CSS applies design system variables and component styles 4. DOM renders 7 major sections in sequence (nav, hero, about, services, process, testimonials, contact, footer) 5. JavaScript initializes scroll listener for navbar effect 6. JavaScript attaches smooth scroll handlers to all anchor links 7. User scrolls trigger navbar styling changes at 50px threshold 8. Anchor link clicks smoothly scroll to target sections 9. Form submission opens mailto client with form data

key_data_flows.input: Window scroll events trigger navbar class toggle
Anchor link clicks captured and redirected to smooth scroll
Contact form collects name, email, phone, service, message
key_data_flows.output: Form submission opens email client with encoded data
Navbar classList modified based on scrollY position

side_effects.effect: DOM class manipulation on nav element during scroll
Default anchor behavior prevented for smooth scrolling
Email client launched on form submission

important_patterns.pattern: Design tokens defined in :root for consistent theming
Base styles with progressive enhancement via media queries
Scroll listener on window, click handlers on anchor elements

edge_cases.case: Anchor link to non-existent ID silently fails (target check exists)
Form submission without JS falls back to mailto protocol
CSS animations may not trigger on older browsers
Backdrop-filter not supported in all browsers (graceful degradation)

performance.metric: All CSS inline, no external stylesheet blocking
Preconnect hints for Google Fonts reduce latency
Script at end of body, non-blocking
Zero images (placeholder decorative elements via CSS)
performance.concern: Large inline CSS (754 lines) could be extracted for caching

security.item: mailto: action exposes email to spam scrapers
No form validation beyond HTML5 required attribute
No sensitive data handling or authentication
External font CDN is trusted (Google Fonts)
